tasks.label: Build and Deploy to Dev Preview
tasks.command: export PATH="/usr/local/Cellar/node@20/20.20.1/bin:$PATH" && /usr/local/Cellar/node@20/20.20.1/bin/node ./node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build && /usr/local/Cellar/node@20/20.20.1/bin/wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name kidsmobi --branch dev
